kubeconfig:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
clusters:
- name: workshop
  cluster:
    server: https://CLUSTER_ENDPOINT
    certificate-authority-data: <ca>
contexts:
- name: ws-a01
  context:
    cluster: workshop
    namespace: ws-a01
    user: a01
current-context: ws-a01
users:
- name: a01
  user:
    token: <sa-token-for-ws-a01>

apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
# ... same shape, ws-a02 token + namespace ...
